name: Broccoli- Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (10-oz. package) frozen chopped or fresh broccoli, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Saute onions and celery in margarine until tender.
3. Combine all ingredients. Pour into a large casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle additional cheese over top, if desired.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, or until cheese is melted and casserole is hot.
Serves 6
